prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie, looks genuinely captured with a mobile phone, not a DSLR or AI render. A beautiful young East Asian woman with fair porcelain skin, soft ash-brown shoulder-length hair, loose face-framing strands partially covering one eye, large brown eyes, natural Korean makeup with soft pink blush and glossy rosy lips. Wearing a bright royal blue vintage-style football jersey with white accents, casual sporty aesthetic, and small silver stud earrings. Sitting in the front passenger seat of a modern car during a sunny afternoon, looking directly into the phone camera with a calm, confident expression. Bright natural sunlight streams through the car window, creating soft highlights on her hair and realistic shadows across her face. Car interior with black leather seats and blue sky visible through the window. Slight handheld framing, authentic front-camera perspective, natural phone HDR, realistic skin texture, fine hair strands, subtle digital noise, candid lifestyle aesthetic, Instagram-style selfie, high detail, photorealistic, looks like an unedited iPhone/mobile camera photo, no studio lighting, no watermark, no text, no logos, no AI-generated look.

promptZh: 超写实智能手机自拍，看起来像是用手机真实拍摄的，而非单反相机或 AI 渲染。一位 美丽的东亚年轻女性，拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤，柔软的灰棕色齐肩发，几缕发丝自然垂落在脸颊旁，部分遮住了一只眼睛，大大的棕色眼睛，精致的韩式自然妆容，带有淡淡的粉色腮红和水润的玫瑰色嘴唇。身穿 明亮的宝蓝色复古风格足球衫，带有白色装饰，休闲运动风，佩戴小巧的银色耳钉。坐在 阳光明媚的午后，现代汽车的副驾驶座上，神情平静而自信地直视手机镜头。明亮的自然阳光透过车窗洒入，在她的头发上形成柔和的高光，并在脸上投下真实的阴影。车内为黑色真皮座椅，窗外可见蓝天。轻微的手持构图，真实的前置摄像头视角，自然的手机 HDR，真实的皮肤纹理，细致的发丝，轻微的数字噪点，随性的生活方式美学，Instagram 风格自拍，高细节，照片级真实，看起来像未经编辑的 iPhone/手机拍摄照片，无影棚灯光，无水印，无文字，无 Logo，无 AI 生成感。
